name: Tritan Internet LLC (Global)
notes:
**Notes:**

**Contacting Our NOC:**
- You can reach our NOC via email at noc@tritan.gg.
- When contacting our NOC, please include your:
    -  ASN
    - Local & remote BGP session IPs
    - IXP name and location

**Peering:**
We have an open peering policy. To request peering, reach out to our NOC.

**Transit:**
We will provide free-of-cost capped IP transit for some use-cases, upon justification.

[List of Peers](https://bgp.tools/as/393577#connectivity) | [Request Peering/Transit](https://tritan.gg/noc?type=transit_request) | [Geofeed](https://tritan.gg/geofeed)
